formulas.name: Runoff Coefficient
formulas.variables: C = Runoff Coefficient, Runoff = Total runoff, Rainfall = Total rainfall
formulas.notes: To calculate the percentage of rainfall that becomes runoff

formulas.name: Infiltration Capacity
formulas.variables: Ic = Infiltration capacity, Infiltrated water = Amount of water infiltrated, Time = Time taken for infiltration
formulas.notes: To calculate the rate at which water infiltrates the soil

formulas.name: Water Table Fluctuation
formulas.formula: Fluctuation = (Pre-monsoon water table - Post-monsoon water table)
formulas.variables: Fluctuation = Change in water table, Pre-monsoon water table = Water table before monsoon, Post-monsoon water table = Water table after monsoon
formulas.notes: To calculate the change in water table due to seasonal variations

formulas.name: Specific Yield
formulas.formula: Sy = (Volume of water / Total volume of aquifer)
formulas.variables: Sy = Specific yield, Volume of water = Volume of water stored, Total volume of aquifer = Total volume of the aquifer
formulas.notes: To calculate the amount of water that can be extracted from an aquifer

formulas.name: Crop Water Requirement
formulas.variables: CWR = Crop water requirement, ETc = Crop evapotranspiration, Area = Area of the crop
formulas.notes: To calculate the total amount of water required by a crop

formulas.name: Water Balance Equation
formulas.variables: P = Precipitation, ET = Evapotranspiration, R = Runoff, I = Infiltration, ΔS = Change in storage
formulas.notes: To calculate the balance between precipitation and other components of the hydrologic cycle

formulas.name: Reservoir Capacity
formulas.variables: RC = Reservoir capacity, Area = Surface area of the reservoir, Depth = Average depth of the reservoir
formulas.notes: To calculate the total storage capacity of a reservoir

formulas.name: Irrigation Efficiency
formulas.formula: IE = (Beneficial water use / Total water applied) × 100
formulas.variables: IE = Irrigation efficiency, Beneficial water use = Amount of water used by the crop, Total water applied = Total amount of water applied
formulas.notes: To calculate the percentage of water that is used beneficially by the crop

formulas.name: Groundwater Recharge
formulas.variables: GWR = Groundwater recharge, Rainfall = Total rainfall, Runoff = Total runoff, Evapotranspiration = Total evapotranspiration
formulas.notes: To calculate the amount of water that recharges the groundwater

formulas.name: Stream Discharge
formulas.variables: Q = Stream discharge, A = Cross-sectional area of the stream, V = Velocity of the stream
formulas.notes: To calculate the volume of water flowing through a stream
